text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day while working quietly in my office, I start
to have trouble focusing.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hello. Oh, you look a bit tired.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't work long hours without breaks,
okay? But I've got just the thing for times like
this...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Here. It's some dried squid I bought in the
shopping district!
choice_data_list:
Huh, "Third-place winner in the Tasty Delicacies
Contest three years in a row."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yup, a fellow bronze collector. I just felt this connection with it, so I bought it, and it's amazing.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Each bite is packed with more flavor than the last!
Highly recommend.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Right? It just can't quite win that contest...
choice_data_list:
I meant you're a runner who grows on people.
The more they get to know you, the more they
end up liking you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! What, that part? You won't get anything
for flattery except dried squid, just so you know.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Forget about me. Let's take a break, all right?
Here, eat some more squid!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try some of the dried squid with Nice Nature.
She's right, it does have a taste that grows on
you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Here's a present for you! Even more of that dried
squid from the shopping district!
choice_data_list: The delicious squid from the other day!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'm glad you liked it. But that's not all today.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
If you dip the squid in this mayo with pepper
flakes...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
See? All it takes is one little addition to
quadruple the taste!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly, I realize something!
choice_data_list:
(I should make one little addition to her training
regimen!)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, did you just get another of those eureka
moments? I'm rooting for you but, don't push
yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, as I'm enjoying the novel sweet and spicy
flavor, I work on a revised training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Here's a present for you! Even more of that dried
squid from the shopping district!
choice_data_list: You got a lot this time...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, well, apparently they want feedback on it
since the Tasty Delicacies Contest is just around
the corner.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They say chewing dried squid helps you think
better, so why don't we take a break and have
some together?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, possibly thanks to the squid, both my
desk work and Nice Nature's training go
exceptionally well.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Would you like some dried squid that won first place in the Tasty Delicacies Contest?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The old man at the dried goods store was crying
tears of joy. I was so happy for him.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
He gave me some squid to celebrate. I insisted on
paying for it, but he just wouldn't allow it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So, wanna take a break? Thinking makes you
hungry, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, we enjoy the taste of squid and victory.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Here. It's some dried squid I bought in the
shopping district!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yup, each bite is packed with more flavor than
the last! Highly recommend.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I have to do my best too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Nothing. Let's eat some dried squid, Trainer!
